subcodes.first_line: The convulsions of the tribes have seized them, and trembling hath encompassed the dwellers of the earth, save whom God willeth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: زلازل قبائل را اخذ نمود و اضطراب سکان ارضرا احاطه کرد الا من شاء الله ظاهر شد
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @business; financial; property matters, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
